overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic waterfront promenade in a cyberpunk city. The player walks along palm-tree lined paths beside a red commercial building, ascends stairs to an upper level, and observes flying vehicles passing over the bay. Bright sunlight illuminates the scene with distant megastructures visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with palm trees overlooking the bay

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead from left to right
camera turns left to walk along the building-lined promenade

agents.ego_description: standing by the waterfront railing then turning to walk along the promenade

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the waterfront promenade
calm bay water with distant haze and floating structures
futuristic glass skyscrapers dominating the skyline
dark rectangular docking platforms floating over the water
metal safety railing along the promenade edge
contemporary street lamp with orange fixture

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a sunny waterfront promenade with palm trees swaying in the breeze. The camera looks out over calm waters toward distant megastructures before a flying vehicle passes overhead, prompting a turn toward the building-lined walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian promenade alongside red commercial building

events.description: moving from open waterfront to building-lined promenade with red facade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the promenade beside the red building

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking towards camera
person in teal jacket leaning on railing looking at water

entered.detail: large structure with red facade and concrete base
wide staircase leading up to upper promenade level
vertical digital poster display on building wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along the shaded side of a red commercial building, the promenade continues with palm trees now lining the right side. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, with some stopping to lean on the railing and look out at the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: promenade approaching stairway to upper level

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade approaching the stairway entrance

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket with backpack walking up the promenade

entered.detail: colorful automated vending machine against the building

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along the red building toward a concrete stairway. A person in a yellow jacket approaches from the opposite direction while palm trees recede into the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway ascending under building overhang

events.description: begin ascending concrete stairs to upper promenade level
character in colorful athletic wear descends stairs passing close to camera

agents.ego_description: walking up the concrete stairs to the upper promenade level

notable_agents.action: person in colorful athletic wear with pink hair descending stairs

entered.detail: metal safety railing on the upper level overlooking water
brightly colored public seating with graffiti and stickers

segments.scene_description: Ascending the wide concrete stairs under the building's overhang, the lighting becomes mixed with shadows. A character in vibrant athletic wear descends past the camera as the upper promenade level comes into view with yellow benches and new railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront promenade with benches overlooking floating platforms

events.description: flying vehicle passes low over the water near the floating platforms
camera turns and tilts upward to observe flying vehicles overhead against the sky

agents.ego_description: walking along upper promenade then stopping to lean on railing and watch flying vehicles

notable_agents.action: person with green hair leaning on railing watching flying cars
person lying on yellow bench relaxing in the sun

entered.detail: dark rectangular docking platforms visible again from upper level
calm bay water visible from the elevated perspective

segments.scene_description: On the upper promenade level, the view opens up again to the bay with floating platforms and passing flying vehicles. The camera passes yellow benches where people relax, then stops near a person with green hair watching the aerial traffic. The clip ends with the camera tilting up to follow flying cars against the bright sky and palm fronds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sunny waterfront promenade up to an elevated observation deck overlooking a futuristic bay. It begins with a view of distant megastructures and a passing flying vehicle before the camera turns to follow a walkway shaded by a red commercial building and swaying palm trees. As the camera moves past pedestrians leaning on the railings, the path leads toward a concrete stairway where the bright sunlight shifts into mixed shadows under the building's overhang. The scene then ascends the stairs, passing a character in athletic wear, before opening up onto an upper level featuring yellow benches and a wider vista of floating platforms. Finally, the camera glides past relaxing visitors and a person with green hair, tilting upward to track flying cars against a bright sky framed by palm fronds.
